objects.name: Drupal security advisory (AV26-359)
objects.description: Serial number: AV26-359 Date: April 16, 2026 On April 15, 2026, Drupal published a security advisory to address a critical vulnerability in the following product: Drupal core – multiple versions The Cyber Centre encourages users and administrators to review the provided web links and apply the necessary updates or perform the suggested mitigations. Drupal core - Critical - Cross-site scripting - SA-CORE-2026-001 Drupal Security Advisories
